paper.title: A Runaway Yellow Supergiant Star in the Small Magellanic Cloud

review.summary: Single-object study of a runaway yellow supergiant (YSG) in the Small Magellanic Cloud (SMC). The paper reports one star (J01020100-7122208) with heliocentric radial velocity ~300 km/s, classified as the first runaway YSG discovered. The star is bound to the SMC; the paper makes no claims about hypervelocity stars, unbound Galactic trajectories, or Galactic escape. No HVS candidates.
